tests.test_name: Testing layer selector renders on the Analyze page
tests.journey: Verify that the testing layer selector component is visible when a user lands on the Analyze page.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Testing layer selector renders on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: The testing layer selector is visible

tests.test_name: Selecting a layer shows it in the dropdown summary
tests.journey: Verify that selecting a predefined testing layer updates the dropdown summary label to reflect the chosen layer.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Selecting a layer shows it in the dropdown summary
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page

tests.test_name: Selected testing layers appear in the analysis metadata
tests.journey: Verify that a predefined testing layer selected before running analysis is correctly captured and serialised into the downloaded JSON shiftdoc metadata.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Selected testing layers appear in the analysis metadata
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page with format 'bdd', role 'Product Owner', layer 'Unit', and fixture 'bdd_sample.feature' uploaded
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User clicks 'Document test cases' and downloads the JSON output
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: JSON output has no unresolved values and shiftdoc metadata includes testing layer 'unit'

tests.test_name: Entering a custom layer via Other shows it in the dropdown summary
tests.journey: Verify that typing a custom value into the Other layer input updates the dropdown summary to reflect the custom layer name.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Entering a custom layer via Other shows it in the dropdown summary
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page

tests.test_name: Typing more than 50 characters in Other shows an error
tests.journey: Verify that exceeding the 50-character limit in the Other layer input triggers an inline validation error message.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Typing more than 50 characters in Other shows an error
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User types a 51-character string into the Other layer input
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: An over-limit error is shown on the testing layer input

tests.test_name: Selecting 4 or more layers falls back silently and analysis still runs
tests.journey: Verify that selecting four or more testing layers does not block the analysis workflow and documentation output is still produced without a hard error.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Selecting 4 or more layers falls back silently and analysis still runs
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page with format 'bdd', role 'Product Owner', four layers selected, and fixture 'bdd_sample.feature' uploaded
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: Documentation appears in the output panel

tests.test_name: A custom layer entered via Other appears in the analysis metadata
tests.journey: Verify that a custom layer name entered via the Other input is correctly propagated into the downloaded JSON shiftdoc metadata after analysis.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: A custom layer entered via Other appears in the analysis metadata
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page with format 'bdd', role 'Product Owner', custom layer 'smoke-layer', and fixture 'bdd_sample.feature' uploaded
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User clicks 'Document test cases' and downloads the JSON output
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: JSON output has no unresolved values and shiftdoc metadata includes testing layer 'smoke-layer'

tests.test_name: Error below trigger persists after dropdown is closed with 51+ char Other text
tests.journey: Verify that the over-limit validation error remains visible below the dropdown trigger after the user closes the testing layer dropdown without correcting the input.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Error below trigger persists after dropdown is closed with 51+ char Other text
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page and has typed a 51-character string into the Other layer input
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User closes the testing layer dropdown
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: The collapsed layer error is visible below the trigger

tests.test_name: Analyze button is disabled while Other text exceeds 50 characters
tests.journey: Verify that the Analyze button is disabled and cannot be activated while the Other layer input contains more than 50 characters, preventing invalid submissions.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Analyze button is disabled while Other text exceeds 50 characters
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page with format 'bdd', role 'Product Owner', fixture uploaded, and a 51-character string in the Other layer input
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User views the Analyze button state

tests.test_name: Analyze button re-enables once the Other text error is fixed
tests.journey: Verify that deleting a character from an over-limit Other layer input to bring it within the 50-character boundary re-enables the Analyze button.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Analyze button re-enables once the Other text error is fixed
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page with format 'bdd', role 'Product Owner', fixture uploaded, and a 51-character string in the Other layer input
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User deletes one character from the Other layer input
